title: Enable Root Account MFA
console_steps: 1. Sign in as the root user
4. Choose MFA device type (Virtual or Hardware)
5. For virtual: scan QR code with authenticator app
terraform_snippet:
# Root MFA must be configured manually via AWS Console.
# Terraform cannot manage root account MFA.
# Use aws_iam_account_password_policy for password policies.

references.title: Ensure MFA is enabled for the root user account
Secure all individual non-console administrative access with MFA

risk_reduction: Critical — eliminates root account compromise risk
rollback_difficulty: Easy — MFA can be removed from root account
